verdicts.paragraph: ground-subtle ink rule corner-sm ruled font-xs font-mono
verdicts.name: keycap
verdicts.intent: A single keyboard-key legend: a small, subtly grounded, bordered mono chip.
verdicts.justification: 8x across 2 directories; every occurrence is a <kbd> with a key legend (Esc, Tab, ↵, arrows) — the role is invisible in the words and decisive in usage.

verdicts.paragraph: vertical gap-md padding-lg ground-subtle rule corner-md ruled
verdicts.name: panel
verdicts.intent: A grouped content surface: a subtly grounded, bordered, padded vertical section.
verdicts.justification: 3 files across 2 directories (editor + options), consistently a <div> section wrapper; 'panel' states the grouping role the seven words spell as a recipe.

verdicts.paragraph: vertical gap-lg padding-2xl centered flush-block max-width-2xl fill-viewport
verdicts.name: page-frame
verdicts.intent: The top-level page shell: a centered, width-capped, viewport-filling vertical flow.
verdicts.justification: Only 2x, but those are both of the corpus's full pages (Editor and Options roots) — frequency matches opportunity, spread is 2 directories.

verdicts.paragraph: control-size-lg rule corner-sm ruled pressable focus:ring
verdicts.justification: Widest spread in the corpus (3 files, 3 directories, all <input> controls) but only 3x, and 'outlined-control' adds the least surplus of the admit candidates — first in line for the next pass as repetition grows.

verdicts.paragraph: grid-fit-sm elastic basis-ratio content-align-start scroll-auto max-height-results-md scrollbar-subtle
verdicts.justification: Mechanically the strongest unit (1.0 closure, 90% closed pairs) but it contains role-bound max-height-results-md and lives in a single directory — general within the results role only.
2x; any name would state the appearance (soft bottom rule) rather than a role, and the paragraph reads fine spelled out.
2x; plausible role (truncating content-text preview) but naming it now would outrun the evidence.
All four usages are form <label>s — a real field-label role — but confined to one directory; a next-pass candidate if it spreads.
Both occurrences are the same empty-state message inside one results feature, and span-all couples it to that grid context.
The selectable row mechanism of the search-results lists specifically — component-owned structure, not vocabulary.
